## Project Name
TODA Rail Pay

## One-Line Description
A cooperative treasury rail for TODA drivers to collect dues, record savings, and release member payouts on Stellar.

## Track
Track 2 Financial Inclusion & Everyday Payments

## Problem It Solves
Driver cooperatives commonly track dues, emergency loans, and maintenance funds in notebooks. TODA Rail Pay gives them wallet-based collection, transparent pooled balances, and auditable payout approvals.

## How It Uses Stellar
TODA Rail Pay uses Freighter wallet signing, Stellar testnet, XLM SAC escrow transfers, Soroban RPC, and a Rust Soroban contract named TodaRailPay. Stellar Wallets Kit is the expansion path for Freighter, xBull, and LOBSTR access beyond the current Freighter-first prototype.

## GitHub Repository
https://github.com/iwanqnalangtalagabatakonagcode/toda-rail-pay

## Network & Deployment
- Network: testnet
- Live app URL (if any): runs locally - see README
- Contract IDs / asset issuers (if any): set after testnet deployment

## Novelty Note
Original StellarX Philippines work using disclosed open-source Stellar tooling, Soroban Rust SDK, Next.js, Prisma, and the provided fullstack guides.
